author: dashboard-bootstrap
content: Design doc for hub v3 written to .design/hub-v3-per-agent-refs.md: per-agent refs (refs/crosslink/agents/<id>, always-fast-forward pushes), pure event sourcing (counters.json and locks.json eliminated), plumbing-based writes (no shared worktree), checkpoint as force-with-lease cache ref, single unified local lock, 4-PR migration sequence with full-state-diff gate. Lock stampede semantics preserved via first-claim-wins + claim-confirm; enforcement model documented as hook-gate + signed attribution + merge gate.
